steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search for 'Flower Fables' and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Click GET action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'Flower Fables' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
steps.statusTrace:

	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:83)

steps.name: And  Click READ action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  'bookInfo' book is present on epub reader screen
